nodes.label: AI image generation accuracy for product placement
nodes.label_negative: AI image generation inconsistency and errors
nodes.grounding_span: Most of the time the glasses do not come out with good accuracy

nodes.label: AI code assistance specificity
nodes.label_negative: AI code assistance overgeneralization and confusion
nodes.grounding_span: I get much better results when I just focus on the specific lines of code related to my request

nodes.label: AI reliability and tool stability
nodes.grounding_span: I also get many errors with chatgpt saying no models available for request and the copolit windows app freezing

nodes.label: Efficient e-commerce product presentation
nodes.grounding_span: My goal is to get the sunglasses to look as close as possible to the real model I'm selling so the customer can see how they look on a persons face

nodes.label: Productive website development
nodes.grounding_span: the large amount of time its taking me to reach conclusive fixes while building my ecommerce website

nodes.label: Control and clarity in coding tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to edit specific blocks of code over a full code

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI when outputs are accurate
nodes.grounding_span: I'm satisfied when the images i need come out perfectly as I ask them to be or when the AI finds the exact code that is causing an issue

nodes.label: Frustration with AI inconsistency and errors
nodes.grounding_span: frustration is all the opposite of those and also the large amount of time its taking me to reach conclusive fixes

nodes.label: Skepticism about AI's ability to replace human skills
nodes.grounding_span: I don't think these models are even close to developing entire websites

nodes.label: Iterative prompt experimentation
nodes.grounding_span: I will usually try different phrasing techniques to get the model to produce a male or female model

nodes.label: Narrow problem decomposition
nodes.grounding_span: it's easier to keep the code focus very small
